name: IdsEdwPdxNtwkDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_result AS ( SELECT PDX_NTWK.PDX_NTWK_SK AS PDX_NTWK_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') END AS SRC_SYS_CD, PDX_NTWK.PROV_ID AS PROV_ID, PDX_NTWK.PDX_NTWK_CD_SK AS PDX_NTWK_CD_SK, PDX_NTWK.PROV_SK AS PROV_SK, PDX_NTWK.DIR_IN AS DIR_IN, PDX_NTWK.EFF_DT_SK AS EFF_DT_SK, PDX_NTWK.TERM_DT_SK AS TERM_DT_SK, PDX_NTWK.PDX_NTWK_PRFRD_PROV_IN AS PDX_NTWK_PRFRD_PROV_IN, PDX_NTWK.ALWS_90_DAY_RX_IN AS ALWS_90_DAY_RX_IN, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PDX_NTWK PDX_NTWK LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON PDX_NTWK.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON PDX_NTWK.PDX_NTWK_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK ) SELECT cte_result.PDX_NTWK_SK AS PDX_NTWK_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_result.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_result.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte_result.PROV_ID AS PROV_ID, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_result.TRGT_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_result.TRGT_CD END AS PDX_NTWK_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_result.PROV_SK AS PROV_SK, cte_result.DIR_IN AS PDX_NTWK_DIR_IN, cte_result.EFF_DT_SK AS PDX_NTWK_EFF_DT_SK, cte_result.TERM_DT_SK AS PDX_NTWK_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_result.TRGT_CD_NM) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_result.TRGT_CD_NM END AS PDX_NTWK_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte_result.PDX_NTWK_CD_SK AS PDX_NTWK_CD_SK, cte_result.PDX_NTWK_PRFRD_PROV_IN AS PDX_NTWK_PRFRD_PROV_IN, cte_result.ALWS_90_DAY_RX_IN AS ALWS_90_DAY_RX_IN FROM cte_result

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:           EdwPdxNtwkExtr

DESCRIPTION:     Pulls data from ids and edw  
      
INPUTS:                IDS - PDX_NTWK
  
HASH FILES:         hf_cdma_codes - CDMA code table - resolve code lookups
               
TRANSFORMS:    TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:      IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes
                
OUTPUTS:            PDX_NTWK_D.dat

MODIFICATIONS: Hugh Sisson  12/2005    Originally Programmed

                                                                         Government Programs                  column as part of pahse 2 changes

Annotations:
This is Source extract data from an IDS table and apply Code denormalization, create a load ready file.

Job Name:
IdsEdwPdxNtwkDExtr

Table:
PDX_NTWK_D
Read from source table PDX_NTWK from IDS.
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure.

Write PDX_NTWK_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Job.
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys: 
CD_MPPNG_SK
Add Defaults and Null Handling
